report.summary: Drafted 3 new social posts (#125-127) covering miner capitulation confirmation ($19K loss/coin at $88K production cost), $2.5B ETF inflows thread (longest weekly streak of 2026 + YTD flip to +$210M), and SEC's first-ever formal crypto securities definitions. Updated newsletter v23 addendum v5 with miner capitulation + Iran strike pause + $400M liquidation context. Created content calendar v32 (3 posts Wed-Fri). Built 3 SVG social cards (miner capitulation dashboard, ETF inflow streak visualization, SEC regulatory timeline). Key narrative: miner capitulation + institutional accumulation divergence intensifies — every prior cycle this combo preceded a major move.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #125: Miner Capitulation Confirmed — production cost $88K vs market $70K, -$19K loss/coin, hashprice at historic lows, historical capitulation-to-rally pattern. CTA to fear-greed-timeline (scheduled Wed Mar 26 5PM ET)

Tweet #126: $2.5B ETF Inflows Thread (3 parts) — longest weekly inflow streak of 2026, 7 straight days, $199M single-day peak, YTD flipped to +$210M net positive, Morgan Stanley MSBT + BlackRock IBIT. CTA to bitcoin-etf-guide (scheduled Thu Mar 27 10AM ET)

Tweet #127: SEC Formally Defines Crypto Securities — first-ever compliance benchmarks, combined with CLARITY Act makes 2026 the regulation year. CTA to crypto-regulations-2026 (scheduled Fri Mar 28 9AM ET)
Newsletter v23 addendum v5: Miner capitulation deep-dive + Iran strike pause market impact + $400M liquidation recap + ETF institutional conviction narrative
Discord/Telegram mid-week update: BTC $70,335, F&G 34, miner capitulation, $2.5B ETF inflows, SEC definitions, $13.5B options expiry Thu alert
Content calendar v32: 3 new posts Wed-Fri + Discord volatility alert for Thu morning options expiry

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: SVG social card: Miner Capitulation — 4-panel data dashboard (production cost $88K, market price $70,335, loss -$19K, ETF inflows $2.5B), historical pattern bar showing 2018 +320% and 2022 +155% post-capitulation rallies, red capitulation badge

SVG social card: $2.5B ETF Inflow Streak — 7-day horizontal bar visualization of daily inflows, key players panel (Morgan Stanley MSBT, BlackRock IBIT), YTD reversal stat (+$210M net positive), green institutional flow theme

SVG social card: SEC Crypto Securities Definitions — 3-milestone regulatory timeline (SEC definitions DONE, CLARITY Act APR MARKUP, FIT21+ IN PROGRESS), 2026 regulation year summary bar, purple regulatory clarity theme

sections.title: Growth Trajectory Analysis
items: BREAKOUT: Miner capitulation narrative — miners losing $19K/coin with hashprice at historic lows. This is a new search interest driver and degen0x's mining guide is perfectly positioned.
PEAK: Institutional vs retail divergence — $2.5B ETF inflows during Fear zone sentiment (F&G 34). The 'smart money buying the dip' angle is extremely shareable.
CATALYST: $13.5B options expiry Thursday Mar 27 — pre-expiry volatility compression at $70K creates high-drama content opportunity.
EMERGING: SEC securities definitions — first-ever formal framework gives fresh search queries like 'SEC crypto securities definition 2026'. Combined with CLARITY Act, regulation content is peaking.
GEOPOLITICAL: Iran strike pause → $70K recovery from $68K — $400M liquidations created dramatic narrative arc. Weekend volatility drives Monday social engagement.
TIME-SENSITIVE: Tax guides — 19 days to April 15. Entering peak search volume window.
BLOCKED: 170+ pages still behind git lock. Deployment gap continues to limit indexing momentum.
